chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1272 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 30-05-2025 Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. **** In compliance of order dated 21.05.2025, Shamsuddin Shaikh, Chief Engineer, PHE, SBA is present and files statement on behalf of respondent No.3, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner. Chief Engineer submits that for the year 2025-26, a proposal has been sent for an approval in respect of different schemes related to municipal area of district Nausharo Feroze, which also covers the grievance of the petitioner. After such statement, counsel for petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to respondents to materialize the schemes and if such schemes are approved, preference be given to the area of the petitioner first. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
